title: CORAL Endurance Paint Roller, 12 inch Frame Double Arm Handle, No Rust Lightweight Strong Fast 42690
features: Are you looking for 12 inch paint roller frame that doesn't rust or contaminate your paint colour? Do you prefer a lightweight and strong handle? Do you use threaded extension poles?
Trouble-free painting of large surfaces. Familiar issues of rust and colour contamination from metal double arm roller handles have been eliminated!
You'll appreciate strong and lightweight design with a threaded connection for fast application with Coral extension poles (sold separately).
You'll feel confident that you can get the job done without the usual frame issues. Better still, buy Coral 42695 replacement legs so you can keep working if your originals are lost or damaged.
Choose great value for money. This large 12 inch paint roller ideal for large surface paint projects on walls, floors, and ceilings. Buy now.
description: Take a look at this 12 inch paint roller from Coral Tools. Created as a dependable double arm paint roller for when you are looking for quick application speeds on most painting projects. You'll gain rust prevention and eliminating grey metal contamination of paint colours, because of an strong all plastic design. As a result you'll feel confident of working with a strong and lightweight frame that gets the job done to a professional standard! Expect a double arm roller frame designed for 12 inch roller covers fitted with end-caps. Produced with an all plastic design. Don't be without this wide paint roller frame on your next painting large surfaces quickly and easily project. Add to cart. Only compatible with Coral 42695 Replacement legs (sold separately) so you can keep working if your original legs are lost or damaged. To all those seeking better results, CORAL is a progressive tool brand creating innovative products that enhance your performance and help you to succeed. The objective of our highly experienced team is to create products that make projects easier, faster, and more affordable than ever before. Testament to our quality and performance, Coral’s fate continues to be intertwined with some of the highest skilled tradespeople and the decoration of some of the worlds most admired buildings. In addition, our products are trusted by many discerning DIY users and homeowners. Millions of Coral products are bought around the world and bestselling lines include paint brushes, paint rollers, wallpaper tools, and decorators’ preparation tools. Coral Tools are a privately owned British company. Errors and omissions excepted (E&OE).
